name: mylyfeumbria
description: PWA mobile app con Firebase per MyLyfeUmbria

scripts.build: vite build && echo. && echo  Build completata! Avvia il preview con: npm run preview && echo  Apri nel browser: http://localhost:4173 && echo.
scripts.build:open: vite build && start http://localhost:4173 && vite preview
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
